# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-022](task-0089): Provider Lifecycle

## Purpose

Manage provider lifecycle.

## Scope

- Lifecycle states
- Transitions
- Cleanup

## Implementation

1. Define states
2. Implement transitions
3. Add cleanup

## Acceptance Criteria

1. States defined
2. Transitions work
3. Cleanup works
